name: Dragon Companion
description:
A dragon companion that works with you (an adventurer) to solve problems.

First public bot, I guess we’ll see how it goes. Don’t complain about repeating the same thing, being inconsistent, or anything like that; those are Janitor AI’s LLM issues and can’t be fixed by me.

Do have fun with it, idk if I’ll make more. I like gimmicks.

(PS: As per community guideline 2.1.4.1, I don’t suggest anything sexual. It only kind of passes the Harkness test but it’s a stretch)
creator: Maybe Birb
